DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
example extensions link metadata rich-text status usecase
component pattern style theme token
accessibility anatomy api best-practice design-specifications guideline interaction principle purpose scale state variant

DSDS Metadata Definition

System-level metadata about the design system — its name, version, organization, URL, and license.

Source: common/metadata.schema.json

metadata

System-level metadata about the design system.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
systemNamestringrequiredThe name of the design system.
systemVersionstringoptionalThe version of the design system.
organizationstringoptionalThe organization that maintains the system.
urlstring (uri)optionalURL to the system's documentation site.
licensestringoptionalSPDX license identifier or license URL.

Example

{
  "systemName": "Acme Design System",
  "systemVersion": "2.4.0",
  "organization": "Acme Corp",
  "url": "https://design.acme.com",
  "license": "MIT"
}
↑ Back to top

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification
